title: openclaw_hook.py: 3 targeted bug fixes — ingest error path, checkpoint config re-apply, tonic gate

steps.description: Verify GITHUB_TOKEN is available for push

params.command: python3 -c "import os; t=os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN',''); print('TOKEN_OK' if t else 'TOKEN_MISSING')"

steps.description: Skip all patches if Bug A return guard already present (all three fixes travel together)

params.command: python3 -c "c=open('openclaw_hook.py').read(); print('ALREADY_PATCHED' if 'if result is None:' in c else 'NEEDS_PATCH')"

steps.description: Prepend changelog entry for the three fixes

params.old_text: # [2026-04-20] Codemine (BLK-NG-193) — Wire SimpleVectorDB persistence into save/load
params.new_text:
# [2026-04-26] Codemine (BLK-FC-215) — Three targeted bug fixes
# What: (A) on_message() wraps ingestor.ingest() in try/except; result=None on failure; return dict gated.
#        (B) graph.config.update(snn_config) re-applied after restore() so checkpoint cannot overwrite code defaults.
#        (C) Unexpected TonicEngine init Exception escalated to logger.warning; _tonic_thread cleared to None.
# Why:  (A) Unbound NameError on result.nodes_created if ingest throws inside the concurrent lock.
#        (B) Pre-tuning config values bleed in from checkpoint on every container restart.
#        (C) Unexpected engine failures were silently swallowed at info level, leaving half-configured tonic state.
# How:  Targeted edits only. Intentional scope differences (no CES, no River, no BrainSwitcher) preserved.
# [2026-04-20] Codemine (BLK-NG-193) — Wire SimpleVectorDB persistence into save/load

steps.description: Bug A: wrap ingestor.ingest() in try/except inside the concurrent lock so result is never unbound

params.old_text:
with self.graph._concurrent_lock:
            result = self.ingestor.ingest(text, source_type=source_type)

            # Run SNN learning step
            step_result = self.graph.step()
params.new_text:
with self.graph._concurrent_lock:
            try:
                result = self.ingestor.ingest(text, source_type=source_type)
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Ingest error: %s", exc)
                result = None

            # Run SNN learning step
            step_result = self.graph.step()

steps.description: Bug A: add early-return guard before nodes_created so None result never reaches len()
Bug B: re-apply snn_config immediately after restore() so code defaults overwrite any stale checkpoint values

params.old_text:
logger.info(
                    "Restored graph from %s (%d nodes, %d synapses)",
                    self._checkpoint_path,
                    len(self.graph.nodes),
                    len(self.graph.synapses),
                )
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Failed to restore checkpoint: %s", exc)
params.new_text:
logger.info(
                    "Restored graph from %s (%d nodes, %d synapses)",
                    self._checkpoint_path,
                    len(self.graph.nodes),
                    len(self.graph.synapses),
                )
                self.graph.config.update(snn_config)
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Failed to restore checkpoint: %s", exc)

steps.description: Bug C: escalate unexpected TonicEngine init Exception to warning and clear _tonic_thread to prevent half-configured state

params.old_text:
except Exception as exc:
                    logger.info("Tonic engine init error: %s — ouroboros-only mode", exc)

steps.description: Verify Bug A: Ingest error warning message present exactly once (once in code, not in changelog)

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'Ingest error:' in l))"

steps.description: Verify Bug A: result is None guard present in on_message return path
Verify Bug B: config.update(snn_config) present after restore
Verify Bug C: logger.warning used for unexpected tonic engine init error (was logger.info)

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'logger.warning' in l and 'Tonic engine init error' in l))"

steps.description: Verify openclaw_hook.py compiles cleanly after all patches
Commit and push to Faux_Clawdbot; treat already-committed as success

params.command: git add openclaw_hook.py && git diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git commit -m 'fix(openclaw_hook): ingest error path, checkpoint config re-apply, tonic gate (#215)' && git push && echo COMMITTED)
